title: pedicularis stenocorys var. pseudostenocorys
intro: Pedicularis stenocorys var. pseudostenocorys, also known as Lophanthus stenocorys or the False Short-leaf Lousewort, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Pedicularis stenocorys var. pseudostenocorys is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
